title: 2026 Golden Globes Winners Summary
text: The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony took place Sunday, January 11, 2026, at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California, hosted by comedian Nikki Glaser for her second consecutive year. "One Battle After Another" dominated the movie categories, earning four awards including Best Comedy Motion Picture, Best Director (Paul Thomas Anderson), Best Supporting Actress (Teyana Taylor), and Best Screenplay. "Hamnet" claimed Best Drama Motion Picture, while "Sinners" won both the Cinematic and Box Office Achievement award and Best Original Score (Ludwig Göransson). Other notable film winners included: Best Animated Film: "KPop Demon Hunters". Best Non-English Language Film: "The Secret Agent" (Brazil). On the television side, "Adolescence" emerged as a major winner, taking home Best Limited Series along with awards for Best Supporting Actor (Owen Cooper) and Best Supporting Actress (Erin Doherty). Additional TV winners featured: Best Drama Series: "The Pitt". Best Comedy Series: "The Studio". Best Comedy Actress: Jean Smart ("Hacks"). The ceremony introduced Best Podcast as a new award category, which was won by Amy Poehler's "Good Hang with Amy Poehler."
